svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 198px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1f2328;
display: inline-block; font-size: 24px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1f2328, #cdd0d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: F7 · mHC 完整结构：shape 与 path 乘法语义

div.div: T=token，n=residual stream，C=hidden；pre 求和，post 广播，res 做 n×n stream mixing。

div.div:
xl
T × n × C
from T×C expand

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Linear φ
head input: T × C
Wφ: C × (2n+n²)
out: T × (2n+n²) split: n | n | n²

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 200px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 910px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Raw heads
z: T × (2n+n²)
H̃pre: T×n
H̃post: T×n
H̃res: T×n×n

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 140px; height: 1px; padding-top: 475px; margin-left: 672px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Hres
Sinkhorn(exp(H̃res))
shape: T × n × n

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 250px; height: 1px; padding-top: 217px; margin-left: 52px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Pre path
u[t,c] = Σs Hpre[t,s] · xl[t,s,c]
stream-axis weighted sum / dot
out: u ∈ T × C

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 347px; margin-left: 72px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Layer F
v = F(u)
in u: T × C → out v: T × C

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 345px; height: 1px; padding-top: 475px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Post path
p[t,s,c] = Hpost[t,s] · v[t,c]
broadcast outer product, no Σ
out: p ∈ T × n × C

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 233px; height: 1px; padding-top: 345px; margin-left: 360px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Residual path
m[t,r,c] = Σs Hres[t,r,s] · xl[t,s,c]
per-token n×n stream matmul
out: T × n × C

div.div:
Hres ∈ Bn ⇒ ||ΠHres||₂ ≤ 1，且 ΠHres 仍在 Bn
pre = weighted reduction，post = broadcast write-back，res = stream-axis matrix mixing
